case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CLARA GRISELDA SANCHEZ COLECIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLECIO, CLARA GRISELDA SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLECIO, CLARA GRISELDA SANCHEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED APR-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COLECIO, CLARA GRISELDA SANCHEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CLARA GISELDA SANCHEZ COLECIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
